CustomField.formula: IF(AND(CONTAINS( Email__c ,'@randstad'), Country__r.Name = 'India'),'RD GDC Employee', IF(referrerCode__c = 'RDIndia','RD GDC Employee', IF(referrerCode__c = 'RDPL','RDPL', IF(OR(RD_Ingestion_Status__c='RDIndiaImport',RD_Ingestion_Status__c='RDIndiaImportClaimed'),'RD GDC', IF(OR(RD_Ingestion_Status__c='RDImport',RD_Ingestion_Status__c='RDImportClaimed'),'RD USA', IF(AND(CONTAINS( Email__c ,'@randstad'),Country__r.Name <> 'India'),'RD USA', IF(CONTAINS( Referrer_s_Email__c ,'@randstad'),'RD REFERRER', IF(OR(referrerCode__c = 'RDILI1054604', referrerCode__c = 'RDILI1058988', referrerCode__c = 'RDILI1058986', referrerCode__c = 'RDILI1058936', referrerCode__c = 'RDILI1057308'),'RD REFERRER', 'TORC' ))))))))
CustomField.label: Randstad category?
